name: Dynamix File Recycle Bin
author: xO-ox-ai
description: A guarded recycle bin for Dynamix File Manager with a validated per-disk/per-dataset allowlist. Supports verified internal /mnt/disk* data drives and local ZFS datasets; user shares, pools, UD/external, remote, boot USB and USB/removable storage are rejected. Bilingual UI (English + Chinese).
overview: Adds per-volume recycle bin support to the Unraid Dynamix File Manager, with age/capacity-based maintenance, bilingual UI, and full history tracking. 为 Unraid Dynamix 文件浏览器添加安全回收站：每盘一个 .RecycleBin，带年龄/容量维护策略、中英双语界面与完整历史记录。
